message: "At last, you have come. I am Loremaster Aelarion. Aelthoria stretches across nine realms - and each holds beasts bound by ancient mages into Astral form. Will you take up the codex and the orb?"
"Then choose your first companion. Each starter is bonded to one of the great elements."
"A wise choice. Take your codex, your first orbs, and your Verdant companion."
"A wise choice. Take your codex, your first orbs, and your Pyre companion."
"A wise choice. Take your codex, your first orbs, and your Tide companion."
"Eldarwyn, Mythwood, Tindrelar, Caelynduin, Vorastel, Lirathven, Solanthil, Norhammar, Veilarnen. Nine realms in all - one for each star of the Aether."
"Return when you are ready, traveler."
"Hah - so the Loremaster gave you a codex too. I am Tharion. I will earn every Mark before you. Until we meet at the Highcrest gates."
"I am Ascender Vaelin. Bring me a beast and the proper Catalyst Shard, and I will channel its Ascension."
"Pyre Catalyst, Tide Catalyst, Verdant Catalyst, Storm Catalyst, Lunar, Solar, Dusk, Dawn, Iron, Glacier, Kingstone. Each shapes a different bloodline."
"The realms are patient. Return when ready."
"I am Matron Sylpha of the Hatchery. Leave a pair with me - bonded beasts of compatible bloodlines, one of each parent - and the realm will gift you their offspring."
"Bloodlines compatible by element will produce a hatchling matching the mother. Hold an Incense and the realm sometimes gifts a special form."
"Leave them on the rug. I will care for them."
"Here is what the realm has shaped for you."
"Walk softly, Warden."

"Spellbinder Orin, at your service. Each beast bears a Codex of spells it can learn - and only those. Show me your beast and a Spirit Crystal, and if the spell is on its learnable list I will swap it into a slot without consuming the crystal. Weapon-form beasts may channel every Beast Spell of their element."

replies.text: What spells can my beast learn?

message: "Every beast in your codex carries a learnable list - the spells of its own elements, a few mundane staples, and a small set of cross-elemental tricks. Not every beast can learn every spell; that is the old law of the realms. Bring it to me and I will read its list aloud."

"Each beast yields one piece of equipment - a Fang, Aegis, Gauntlet, Crown, or one of two Signet Rings. Legendary beasts forge the Fang and Aegis, the only pieces that channel every Beast Spell of their element. Common beasts forge the rest - Gauntlets, Crowns, and Rings - and each casts one signature spell while worn."
"Done. The crystal returns to your pouch; your beast remembers it now."
"The crystals are patient."

"Champion - the realm has been still for too long. The Conclaves grow stale. Speak the rite and the Wardens will rebuild their bonds and stand ready for rematches. New wardens will be able to earn Marks again."
"It is sung. The nine Conclaves now bear fresh seals. Tour them at your leisure - their Wardens await."
"Return when you wish to renew the realms."
"I am Loresinger Iri. I rename only those beasts you bound yourself. Speak the new name and I will sing it into the codex."
"It is sung. The realm remembers."
"Keeper Thalor here. Walk with your Bond Companion and you will both grow. Some of the rarest Ascensions come only through walking together."
"Done. Your bond will deepen with each step."
"Walk well, Warden."
"Welcome to the Ethereal Glade. Beasts you have bound elsewhere may roam here freely - rebind one to bring it back, or simply watch."
"It is loose in the Glade now."
"You have one chance to retrieve six. Pick well."
"The Glade is calm today."
"I am Champion-Seer Orielle. Show me nine Conclave Marks of one realm and I will open the path to its Eldritch Council and Highlord."
"Then climb. The Council awaits."
"Return when the Marks are yours."
"Aether Archivist Belren. The Vault holds your bonded beasts beyond what your codex can carry."
"Done. The codex marks them ready again."
"Done. They will rest until called."
"The Vault is patient."
"Smith Korran of the forge. Bring me beast essence and I will craft Fangs, Hides, and Aegises. Divine essences yield rare luminous gear."
"It will be ready by morning."
"Welcome to the Sanctum. Shall I tend to your bonded beasts?"
"They are restored. Travel safely."
"The Sanctum is open day and night."
"Welcome to the Bazaar. Orbs, vials, escape cords, repels and crystals - we have them all."
"Come back any time."

"Welcome to Willowmere, traveler. This is your first step into Eldarwyn. Eldarwyn, a verdant peninsula of mossy hills and ancient ruins. Take these gifts of our realm - you will need them on the trail."
"I am Brennor, Warden of the Thornglen Conclave. My Conclave is bound to the Rock element. Defeat me and you will earn the Stoneheart Mark."
"Then prove it."
"Return when you have steeled your bond."
"Well fought. Take the Stoneheart Mark - and a Spirit Crystal of my Conclave."
"I am Selene, Warden of the Azuremoor Conclave. My Conclave is bound to the Water element. Defeat me and you will earn the Tidesong Mark."
"Then prove it."
"Return when you have steeled your bond."
"Well fought. Take the Tidesong Mark - and a Spirit Crystal of my Conclave."
"I am Lirael, Warden of the Amberhollow Conclave. My Conclave is bound to the Electric element. Defeat me and you will earn the Stormcoil Mark."
"Then prove it."
"Return when you have steeled your bond."
"Well fought. Take the Stormcoil Mark - and a Spirit Crystal of my Conclave."
"I am Eryndis, Warden of the Bramblefen Conclave. My Conclave is bound to the Grass element. Defeat me and you will earn the Verdant Mark."
"Then prove it."
"Return when you have steeled your bond."
"Well fought. Take the Verdant Mark - and a Spirit Crystal of my Conclave."
"I am Vasilan, Warden of the Ashenford Conclave. My Conclave is bound to the Poison element. Defeat me and you will earn the Venomroot Mark."
"Then prove it."
"Return when you have steeled your bond."
"Well fought. Take the Venomroot Mark - and a Spirit Crystal of my Conclave."
"I am Yulienne, Warden of the Mistspire Conclave. My Conclave is bound to the Psychic element. Defeat me and you will earn the Mindweave Mark."
"Then prove it."
"Return when you have steeled your bond."
"Well fought. Take the Mindweave Mark - and a Spirit Crystal of my Conclave."
"I am Khorus, Warden of the Gravelmark Conclave. My Conclave is bound to the Ground element. Defeat me and you will earn the Stoneform Mark."
"Then prove it."
"Return when you have steeled your bond."
"Well fought. Take the Stoneform Mark - and a Spirit Crystal of my Conclave."
"I am Haerthal, Warden of the Dragonshire Conclave. My Conclave is bound to the Fire element. Defeat me and you will earn the Flameheart Mark."
"Then prove it."
"Return when you have steeled your bond."
"Well fought. Take the Flameheart Mark - and a Spirit Crystal of my Conclave."
"You wear no banner. Then you are not of the Crimson Talon. Out of our way - or fall."
"As you wish."
"The Crimson Talon will return. We always do."
"I am Ravenmaw Vex, master of the Crimson Talon. I would harness beast power for conquest. Stand aside, Warden."
"Then break with the rest."
"Hmm. The Crimson Talon is undone. The realm... is yours, for now."
"I am Loremarch Aelfar, of the Eldritch Council. My Conclave answers to the Rock element. Step forward."
"I am Whisperseer Yralin, of the Eldritch Council. My Conclave answers to the Ice element. Step forward."
"I am Shadeweaver Voren, of the Eldritch Council. My Conclave answers to the Ghost element. Step forward."
"I am Dragonkin Sael, of the Eldritch Council. My Conclave answers to the Dragon element. Step forward."
"I am Tharion the Verdant, Highlord of Eldarwyn. The Council has fallen. Now you face me. Show me every bond you have forged."
"For the realm."
"You have outdone me. Take the title for Eldarwyn."

"Welcome to Newhaven, traveler. This is your first step into Mythwood. Mythwood, where ancient towers brush the clouds and bell-songs guide travelers. Take these gifts of our realm - you will need them on the trail."

"You wear no banner. Then you are not of the Skull Wraiths. Out of our way - or fall."

"The Skull Wraiths will return. We always do."
"I am Guzmar Boneking, master of the Skull Wraiths. I would live outside the laws of the realm. Stand aside, Warden."
"Then break with the rest."
"Hmm. The Skull Wraiths is undone. The realm... is yours, for now."
"I am Hala-Lyr Brawl, of the Eldritch Council. My Conclave answers to the Fighting element. Step forward."
"I am Olivya Stoneheart, of the Eldritch Council. My Conclave answers to the Rock element. Step forward."
"I am Acerolyn Wraith, of the Eldritch Council. My Conclave answers to the Ghost element. Step forward."
"I am Kahili-Sael Wing, of the Eldritch Council. My Conclave answers to the Flying element. Step forward."
"I am Hauarionel Newleaf, Highlord of Solanthil. The Council has fallen. Now you face me. Show me every bond you have forged."
"For the realm."
"You have outdone me. Take the title for Solanthil."

"Welcome to Wedgemoor, traveler. This is your first step into Norhammar. Norhammar, an industrial frontier of black smoke and standing stones. Take these gifts of our realm - you will need them on the trail."
"I am Milarya, Warden of the Milobrook Conclave. My Conclave is bound to the Grass element. Defeat me and you will earn the Grass Mark."
"Then prove it."
"Return when you have steeled your bond."
"Well fought. Take the Grass Mark - and a Spirit Crystal of my Conclave."
